nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: Bushveld
nodes.summary: Bushveld是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括灰颈鹭鸨、Red-crested korhaan、Black-backed puffback等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Black-backed puffback
nodes.summary: Black-backed puffback（Black-backed puffback，学名 Dryoscopus cubla），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于Bushveld，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: From the vicinity of the equator and northwards it is replaced by the somewhat larger northern puffback, with which it forms a superspecies. They are commonly found in gardens, riparian thickets, mangroves, woodlands, moist (or less commonly arid) savanna, bushveld and especially towards the south, fringes of afromontane forest. They are present from sea level to some 2,200 m.a.s.l., and are the only puffback species to occur over much of their range. Highest reporting rates are from the densest woodlands, though all woodland types, including Racosperma plantations, are utilized
